claim: Open Responses is a new API standard for open models that provides standardized support for tool calling, agentic capabilities, and multimodal inputs across diverse model providers
actionable: Use the Open Responses standard when building APIs that need cross-provider compatibility for agent frameworks
source_title: Open Responses - The NEW Standard API for Open Models

claim: Open Responses enables models to expose internal tools, MCPs, and handle reasoning traces with built-in support for reasoning summaries and detailed reasoning tokens
actionable: Leverage the reasoning capability in Open Responses to get both detailed thinking and summarized outputs for reasoning-intensive tasks
source_title: Open Responses - The NEW Standard API for Open Models

claim: The Claude API has become the most popular API endpoint among Chinese model providers because of Claude Code compatibility and tool support
actionable: If deploying open models, consider implementing Claude API compatibility to attract users of agentic coding tools
source_title: Open Responses - The NEW Standard API for Open Models

claim: Tool choice is a key feature where you can specify that an agent must use tools, cannot use tools, or has the option to use tools - this needs to be trained into open models
actionable: When fine-tuning open models, ensure they support tool choice specifications to improve agent control and reliability
source_title: Open Responses - The NEW Standard API for Open Models

claim: Early adopters of Open Responses standard include Hugging Face, Vercel, OpenRouter, LM Studio, Ollama, and VLLM
actionable: Check if your preferred model serving platform or framework is on the early adopters list to ensure Open Responses support
source_title: Open Responses - The NEW Standard API for Open Models
